series_metadata.series_description: Applications and correspondence from students related to this program.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain applications and correspondence from awardees and Attorney General''s Office in office for 5 years after final payment made by student. After audit by Auditor of State is completed and released and Federal Government audit, if any, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain data entry SSN and payment history from Attorney General''s Office (including interest paid) 5 years after final payment made by student. After audit by Auditor of State is completed and released and Federal Government audit, if any, destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
